Alright, I have this problem:

**Problem Statement:**
There is a polynomial \( P(x) \) with integer coefficients such that
\[ P(x) = \frac{(x^{2310} - 1)^6}{(x^{105} - 1)(x^{70} - 1)(x^{42} - 1)(x^{30} - 1)} \]
holds for every \( 0 < x < 1 \). Find the coefficient of \( x^{2022} \) in \( P(x) \).
